====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|width=74
|trainer=Jupiter
|pkmn=Crobat
|stage1=Golbat

|img=Jupiter Golbat DPA.png
|cap=Jupiter's Golbat
|img2=Jupiter Crobat DPA.png
|epnum=DPA08
|epname=Team Galactic's Conspiracy, Revealed!!
|desc={{p|Crobat}} is Jupiter's main Pokémon. It first appeared as a {{p|Golbat}} when it partnered up with {{p|Toxicroak}} in a Double Battle against [[Mitsumi]]'s {{p|Infernape}} and {{p|Leafeon}}. This battle continued in ''[[DPA09|Challenge!! The Fortress of Steel]]'' as Golbat was the only one left on her side as Toxicroak got taken out. During the midst of their battle after {{OBP|Jun|DPA}}'s arrival. Jupiter {{m|Fly|flees}} on her Golbat while Saturn flees on his. Sometime before ''[[DPA14|A Novel Test!!]]'', her Golbat ended up evolving into a Crobat. In that same chapter, it battled with Mitsumi's {{p|Milotic}}. Jupiter decides to take advantage of the battle by mentioning about Mitsumi's past. Crobat reappeared during the Spear Pillar arc. During the first part of that arc, it battled Jun's {{p|Dragonite}} but the battle was stopped as {{p|Dialga}}'s {{m|Roar of Time}} activated. It last appeared when Hareta and the others took on Charon.

Crobat's only known move is {{m|Air Slash}}.}}
